channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Israel uses ‘battlefield evidence’ to prosecute Palestinians abroad
item.description: Palestinian activists are being put on trial in Europe for supporting Hamas on the basis of Israeli evidence.

item.title: ‘My voice is being heard’: A month of India’s Cockroach Janta Party
item.description: Satirical party launches nationwide Gen Z protest to demand federal education minister's removal over exam paper leaks.

item.title: Iran war day 109: Tehran, Washington, sign MoU electronically
item.description: Iran’s National Security Council said on Monday that the deal ends fighting on all fronts, including in Lebanon.

item.title: Japan’s central bank raises interest rates to highest level since 1995
item.description: Bank of Japan hikes benchmark rate to 1 percent, continuing shift away from decades of ultra-low borrowing costs.

item.title: Venezuela signs power deal with US energy giant
item.description: Venezuela has signed an agreement with General Electric Vernova aimed at boosting electricity generation

item.title: Football upstages politics as Iranians rally behind their team at World Cup
item.description: In opener against New Zealand in Los Angeles, Iran's Team Melli gets cheers from thousands of anti-regime supporters.

item.title: UK seizes Russian ‘shadow fleet’ tanker – what that means
item.description: UK's Royal Marines conduct first-of-its-kind operation in the English Channel, causing other tankers to turn around.

item.title: US says Iran nuclear talks begin after framework deal signing
item.description: The White House says the proposed memorandum of understanding with Iran is only a framework agreement.

item.title: Iran draw 2-2 with New Zealand in politically charged World Cup match
item.description: Elijah Just scored both of New Zealand's goals in either half; Rezaeian and Mohebbi levelled for Iran in Group G game.

item.title: Ukraine starts negotiations to join EU
item.description: Ukraine has officially opened the first phase of membership talks with the European Union on Monday.

item.title: Who is Vozinha, Cape Verde’s viral goalkeeper at the World Cup?
item.description: From his hometown of Sao Vicente in Cape Verde, Vozinha has been his jersey name throughout his club career.

item.title: US stock market jumps as US-Iran deal stirs hopes for end to energy turmoil
item.description: Benchmark S&P 500 rises 1.7 percent, while tech-heavy Nasdaq jumps 3.1 percent.

item.title: Saudi Arabia draw 1–1 against Uruguay in World Cup opening game
item.description: Abdulelah Alamri gives Saudi Arabia a first-half lead before Maxi Araujo equalises late in the Group H game in Miami.

item.title: Netanyahu says Israel will remain in Lebanon, Syria, and Gaza
item.description: Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu says Israeli forces will maintain a ‘security zone’ in occupied Lebanon.

item.title: South Sudan’s Jonglei: Who burned homes and silenced hospitals?
item.description: Government and opposition forces accused of destruction in Jonglei amid burned villages and mass displacement.

item.title: US fuel prices to take ‘months’ to normalise after US-Iran deal to end war
item.description: Producers will need time to ramp up output, while port bottlenecks and heightened demand will keep US prices up.

item.title: US Air Force B-52 crashes in California
item.description: Eight people are believed to have died after a US Air Force B-52 Stratofortress crashed shortly after takeoff

item.title: Gavin Newsom says he’s being investigated by Trump
item.description: California’s Democratic Governor claims President Donald Trump has launched a criminal investigation against him.

item.title: Iran war live: Vance says IAEA to return to Iran, no tolls in Hormuz Strait
item.description: Backlash to US-Iran deal grows in Israel as Iranian vessels pass through Strait of Hormuz after US lifts naval blockade.

item.title: FIFA clears World Cup referee accused of making white supremacist gesture
item.description: Australian referee Shaun Evans says he didn’t intend to communicate 'message, affiliation, game or belief of any kind'.

item.title: Journalist hit by Israeli strike while reporting in Lebanon
item.description: A journalist for Press TV has been hit by shrapnel while filming a report on Israeli attacks in southern Lebanon.

item.title: Egypt draw 1–1 with Belgium at World Cup group game
item.description: Emam Ashour's first international goal gave Egypt the lead, before veteran Romelu Lukaku forced an own goal to equalise.

item.title: Iran 2-2 New Zealand: World Cup 2026 – as it happened
item.description: All our updates, photo coverage and text commentary from the Group G match at Los Angeles Stadium.

item.title: Can a social media ban protect young users?
item.description: The UK says it's banning access to social media for those under age 16.

item.title: 7-year-old mourns father and brother killed in Israeli strike on Gaza
item.description: 7-year-old mourns father and brother killed in Israeli strike on Gaza.
